hero.title: We buy
hero.institutional: Every asset is acquired to be held, repositioned and operated over the long term. Zero buildings resold since 2020.
hero.subtitle: Disciplined execution. Long-term vision.

operations.title: In-house management
operations.desc: We operate ourselves. Every building, every day.

strategy.title: Buy to hold
strategy.desc: Reposition to create value. Hold to preserve it.

founder.text: Founded by Olivier Lemieux. Over ten years in construction. 450+ units acquired and repositioned since 2020.

broker.title: Have a building to sell?
broker.text: We actively buy multi-residential buildings in our target markets. Fast analysis. Response within 48 hours.

presentation.title: Our vision
presentation.text: Become the benchmark in multi-residential real estate in Quebec.
presentation.text2: Since 2020, ORÉA has been building a portfolio focused on Greater Montreal and Estrie. Bigger buildings. A stronger team. A long-term vision — to leave behind a higher-quality housing stock.

audience.title: Working with ORÉA
audience.intro: We work with lenders and partners who share our approach: discipline, long term, execution.

meta.title: About | Gestion ORÉA
meta.description: Discover the history, mission and values of Gestion ORÉA, your real estate management partner.

header.title: About ORÉA
header.subtitle: ORÉA is a real estate holding company specializing in the acquisition, management and enhancement of multi-residential assets in Quebec.
header.positioning: Built in Estrie since 2020, ORÉA now focuses its growth on Greater Montreal.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: A real estate holding company built on excellence and long-term vision.

ecosystem.title: Supporting ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: ORÉA relies on an ecosystem of complementary businesses that support certain operations, management and development functions.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: Transform underperforming buildings into exceptional assets.
mission.text2: Through rigorous management, targeted renovations and disciplined execution, ORÉA repositions multi-residential buildings into quality living environments — better operated, better maintained and better suited to tenant expectations. Every project contributes to the lasting improvement of Quebec's housing stock.

rigor.title: Operational rigor
rigor.description: Every building is managed with the same discipline as an institutional portfolio. Processes, data, follow-up — nothing is left to chance.

longterm.title: Long-term vision
longterm.description: We don't buy to flip. We build a portfolio designed to last and create value over decades.

local.title: Local roots
local.description: We know our markets. Greater Montreal and Estrie — we invest where we understand the ground.

quality.title: Asset quality
quality.description: A well-renovated building attracts better tenants, generates better revenue and holds its value. That's our core belief.

media.title: Podcasts
media.subtitle: Olivier Lemieux shares his vision of multi-residential real estate.

investments.title: Our investments
investments.subtitle: The ecosystem of companies founded and supported by Olivier Lemieux.

team.title: The founder
team.bio1: Ten years in construction. Thousands of hours building other people's projects. In 2020, Olivier Lemieux decided to build his own. With his own hands, he acquired, renovated and managed his first multi-residential building — no partner, no team, no safety net.
team.bio2: The timing? The worst imaginable. Since day one, the real estate market has faced unprecedented upheaval: rising rates, soaring costs, tightening credit. Where many pulled back, Olivier chose to adapt. Reinvent. Innovate. Push through the hard times without ever compromising the vision.
team.bio3: That resilience became ORÉA's DNA. Building after building, market after market, Olivier turned obstacles into competitive advantage — building an internal management structure capable of performing in any condition. In just a few years, ORÉA went from one man with one building to a five-person team and a rapidly expanding multi-regional portfolio.
team.bio4: Father of three daughters, Olivier runs ORÉA the way he builds: with discipline, no shortcuts, and the conviction that only solid foundations stand the test of time.
